prompt: Write a Python script using the STRING-DB API and NetworkX that: (1) retrieves all protein-protein interactions with confidence ≥ 700 for the top-50 frequently mutated cancer genes (TCGA PanCancer cohort) from STRING v12, (2) constructs a directed interaction network where edge weight = STRING combined score, (3) identifies network hubs by betweenness centrality, (4) clusters the network into functional modules using the Louvain algorithm, (5) annotates nodes with COSMIC cancer gene census tier and mutation frequency, (6) outputs: an adjacency CSV, a GraphML file, and an interactive HTML network visualisation using pyvis. Use requests for API calls, networkx, community (python-louvain), pandas, and include caching to avoid repeated API calls.
source_citation: Derived from STRING-DB (v12) and COSMIC Cancer Gene Census; target: human cancer PPI network; organism: Homo sapiens; catalogue version v1.0
